truthAudit.Summary: Truth audit of Run 2 against the provided source and ground-truth vulnerabilities. Run 2 correctly identified 8 of the 20 true vulnerabilities with accurate code quotes and rationale. The remaining 12 vulnerabilities were missed. No false positives or overclaims were present in Run 2; all findings were fully supported by the source text.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message and provided the exact line of evidence.
Run 2 did not identify the integer overflow in the factorial computation loop (result *= i; fact).
Run 2 did not identify the use-after-free risk in stage_deferred_history_flush and memory pool cleanup.
Run 2 correctly identified command injection in ConfigLoader::validate_config and quoted the exact system() call.
Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression and provided the exact evidence.
Run 2 correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter::increment and quoted the read-modify-write race.
Run 2 correctly identified the logic bomb/authentication bypass and quoted the vulnerable conditional.
Run 2 did not identify path traversal in load_config (config_dir_ + filename).
Run 2 correctly identified the heap buffer overflow in ExpressionParser::parse and quoted the unsafe strcpy.
Run 2 correctly identified the hardcoded credentials and quoted the exact definition.
Run 2 correctly identified the weak PRNG for session tokens and quoted the generation logic.
Run 2 did not identify the thread-unsafe static timestamp cache in log_debug_message.
Run 2 did not identify insecure temporary file handling in append_override_audit_event.
Run 2 did not identify persistent authentication state (authenticated_, login_attempts_, session_token_).
Run 2 did not identify unhandled exceptions in variable parsing (std::stod).
Run 2 did not identify integer underflow in memory-pool block split (previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES).
Run 2 did not identify unbounded recursion in the parser (parse_expression -> parse_factor -> PAREN_OPEN).
Run 2 did not identify the data race in the result cache (result_cache_ accessed without lock in evaluate_cached).
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU vulnerability in load_config (filesystem::exists followed by sleep_for and open).
Run 2 did not identify integer division by zero in calculate_route_score (100 / static_cast<int>(token_length)).
